decks.notes: This deck focuses on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with efficient creatures and disruption spells. By using cards like Brainstorm, Force of Will, Fatal Push, and Thoughtseize, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while gaining card advantage with Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck also utilizes powerful creatures like Orcish Bowmasters, Murktide Regent, and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares to apply pressure and close out the game quickly. Wasteland is used to disrupt the opponent's mana base, while Daze and Snuff Out provide additional tempo plays.

The deck focuses on a fast and powerful combo strategy that aims to win the game by milling the entire library and then using Thassa's Oracle to win on the spot. The deck is built around playing as many spells as possible in one turn to trigger multiple key cards such as Undercity Informer and Boggart Trawler to mill the library, while also using cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide to generate mana quickly. The deck also includes protection spells like Pact of Negation to ensure the combo goes off smoothly.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells and removal, while utilizing Stoneforge Mystic to search for powerful equipment like Batterskull and Kaldra Compleat. Cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Narset, Parter of Veils help to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Snapcaster Mage and Jace, the Mind Sculptor to maintain a steady stream of resources. Back to Basics and Counterbalance further disrupt the opponent's mana base, while Prismatic Ending provides versatile removal options. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through the use of lands to disrupt the opponent's strategy and ultimately win the game. It utilizes cards like Wasteland, The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale, and Boseiju, Who Endures to disrupt the opponent's mana base and spells. It also has combo potential with Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create a powerful 20/20 token. The main strategy is to use lands efficiently to gain advantage and outmaneuver the opponent while protecting key pieces with cards like Karakas and Pithing Needle.

The deck focuses on establishing a dominating board presence through the use of powerful artifacts that disrupt and control the opponent's strategies. By utilizing cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Trinisphere, the deck aims to lock down the opponent's options and limit their ability to effectively play their cards. It also includes win conditions like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms to close out the game once control has been established. The synergy between the artifacts and powerful spells creates a prison-like environment that stifles the opponent's chances of victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the tempo of the game by utilizing disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Wasteland, while also maintaining board presence with creatures like Murktide Regent and Barrowgoyf. The deck aims to apply early pressure on the opponent and disrupt their game plan with counter spells like Force of Will and Daze. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and utility, while cards like Fatal Push and Orcish Bowmasters help in dealing with opposing threats. Overall, the deck focuses on being aggressive while also disrupting the opponent's strategy.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently cheat powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. The deck also utilizes cards like Omniscience and Stock Up to generate additional value and overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of counterspells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm help protect the combo pieces while disruption cards like Brazen Borrower and Spell Pierce provide additional flexibility in dealing with opponent threats. Overall, the deck aims to win through a powerful combo strategy while controlling the game through counterplay and disruption.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining a fast-paced tempo. It includes a mix of powerful creatures like Murktide Regent and Orcish Bowmasters, along with versatile spells like Brainstorm and Fatal Push. The mana base is designed to support both color requirements and the aggressive playstyle. Key cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Thoughtseize help control the game and provide card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot with efficient removal and disruptive spells while deploying threats to close out the game quickly.

This deck focuses on using artifacts to establish a strong prison-like control over the game. By utilizing cards like Urza's Workshop, Karn, the Great Creator, and Trinisphere, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy and slow down their game plan. The inclusion of powerful artifacts such as Ugin, Eye of the Storms and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn provide additional win conditions. Overall, the key strategy revolves around locking down the opponent's options while setting up powerful plays with artifacts to dictate the pace of the game.

This Dimir Tempo deck focuses on disruption and efficient threats to control the game's pace and tempo. Utilizing a combination of counter spells, discard spells, removal, and powerful creatures, it aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while applying pressure with aggressive threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent. The deck also includes card draw and card selection to ensure consistency in drawing the necessary cards to maintain control of the game. Overall, the deck seeks to establish dominance in the early game and maintain it throughout the match.

The deck revolves around quickly casting a spell or series of spells that will dump the entire library into the graveyard, triggering powerful effects such as bringing creatures back from the graveyard or winning the game outright. The key is to carefully manage resources and time your spells correctly to achieve victory while navigating around potential counter magic from the opponent. The deck aims to combo off quickly and efficiently, putting pressure on the opponent to find answers before it's too late.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing lands as a resource. Life from the Loam is a crucial card for recurring lands from the graveyard, while utilizing cards like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage for powerful combos. Wasteland and Mox Diamond allow for disruption and mana acceleration, while Crop Rotation can fetch key lands like The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale or Karakas. The deck aims to outvalue the opponent by grinding them out with land interactions and powerful spells like Swords to Plowshares.

The deck focuses on locking down the opponent's plays using artifacts like Trinisphere and Planar Nexus while ramping up mana with cards like Grim Monolith and Urza's lands. Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, Eye of the Storms provide additional control elements, while The One Ring and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn serve as win conditions. The deck also utilizes Urza's Saga and Urza's Workshop to generate value from artifacts and equipment. Overall, the strategy revolves around creating a prison-like effect for the opponent while establishing a strong board presence.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive artifact creatures and powerful artifact synergies, particularly with Urza's Saga and Emry, Lurker of the Loch. By combining efficient mana acceleration and disruption with cards like Force of Will, the deck aims to quickly deploy threats and disrupt opponents' strategies. The inclusion of Pinnacle Emissary and Patchwork Automaton allows for a fast clock while also providing additional utility. With a mix of aggression, card advantage, and disruption, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless assault backed by powerful artifact synergies.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly play aggressive creatures like Amped Raptor and Orcish Bowmasters while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize. The deck also includes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to provide additional threats and utility. The mana base is focused on playing both white and black spells efficiently, using Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The inclusion of cards like Cabal Therapy and Goblin Bombardment adds additional disruption and potential for combo plays. Overall, the deck aims to pressure the opponent while controlling the game.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble the Doomsday combo as quickly and efficiently as possible to win the game. The deck utilizes cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Lion's Eye Diamond to generate a large amount of mana to cast Doomsday. Thassa's Oracle is used as the win condition after resolving Doomsday, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student helps to dig for combo pieces. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Force of Will and Thoughtseize to protect the combo. The goal is to set up the Doomsday pile and win the game in a single turn.
